/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/readMarket.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/readMarket.dir/readMarket.cpp.o -o readMarket  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtorch.so.2.9.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtorch_cpu.so.2.9.1" -Wl,--as-needed /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc10.so.2.9.1 -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtorch.so.2.9.1" -Wl,--as-needed
